features: Includes Homes&Linen Fleece Faux Fur Roll Mink Throws Bed Blankets

Buy luxury Fleece Blankets Ideal For Sofas, Bed Throws, Travel, Car or Picnic. These cheap blankets throws are perfect for Single, double or king size bed. It is also perfect for dog, cat, rabbit or any other pet. These cheap blankets and extra large throws comes in many colors.
Keep yourself warm and cosy whilst lounging around the home and save on heating costs as the cold winter nights set in.Perfect for indoor and outdoor use to provide continuous warmth in cold weather.

Washing Instruction: These blankets are machine washable for easy cleaning any time. Please wash it in slightly warm water in 40 degrees with same or similar colors and please do not bleach or tumble dry.
